_doc: GitHub Ruleset for the anchor/* tag namespace. Prevents accidental or malicious tampering with canary anchor tags. Apply per caller repo: gh api -X POST /repos/<owner>/<repo>/rulesets --input docs/canary-tag-ruleset.json. SETUP: Before applying, (1) create an org-level team named 'canary-bypass-actors' with EXACTLY ONE member (the repo owner). (2) Resolve that team's id: gh api /orgs/sonarmd/teams/canary-bypass-actors --jq .id. (3) Substitute the numeric id below for <BYPASS_TEAM_ID>. Rationale: OrganizationAdmin bypass would allow ANY org admin to delete anchor tags by accident. Team-based bypass scoped to a single-member team locks deletion to the one authorized human.
name: history-canary-anchors
